God Will Visit the Faithful with Assurances Helaman, Gid, and Teomner take the city of Manti by a stratagem-The Lamanites withdraw-The sons of the people of Ammon are preserved as they stand fast in defense of their liberty and faith (Alma 58 headnote). Alma 58 is the last part of Helaman's letter to Moroni (the letter began in Alma 56). Man Oh Manti Helaman wanted to retake the city of Manti, but he and the other chief captains were convinced that the Lamanites would not fall for another…
